Will not be updated
body:
# I Know What I'm Doing!
## What does this mod do?
I Know What I'm Doing! is a simple mod to disable the pesky prompt that appears when loading into a world using experimental features
## This doesn't work, help!
Make sure you have Fabric API installed. Otherwise, make a bug report on github and I'll get to it as soon as possible
